name: system-knowledge
description: 系统知识图插件市场 — 面向智能体协作开发的系统知识基础设施（功能依赖图、变更影响分析、业务链路测试路径）。

plugins.name: system-knowledge-plugin
plugins.description: System knowledge graph infrastructure for agent-collaborative development: query feature dependencies, analyze change impact, and generate business-chain test paths.
